business_response_composer.que_entendi: Consulta de inventario logistica resuelta con el perfil inventory stock dimension summary
business_response_composer.datos_usados: Perfil de respuesta: inventory.stock.dimension.summary. Datos usados: base_codigos, logistica_movimientos_entrega, logistica_movimientos_consumo, logistica_movimientos_cobro. Fuentes de evidencia: semantic_context, business_query_semantic_plan, semantic_capability_registry, .dd_sinonimos, .dd_reglas
business_response_composer.resultado: Consulté el saldo del material serializados agrupado por móvil. Total general: 43629. Móviles con saldo: 26
business_response_composer.alertas: La respuesta se armó desde evidencia agregada por dimensión y no desde detalle operativo sin resumir
business_response_composer.siguiente_accion: La tabla muestra móvil, código, descripción, tipo, entregas, devoluciones, consumos, cobros y saldo

query_intelligence.query: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(emp.movil), '') AS dimension, '' AS cedula, '' AS nombre, '' AS empleado, COALESCE(MAX(emp.movil), '') AS movil, '' AS bodega, mov.codigo AS codigo, COALESCE(MAX(cat.descripcion), '') AS descripcion, COALESCE(MAX(cat.tipo), '') AS tipo, SUM(mov.entregas) AS entregas, SUM(mov.devoluciones) AS devoluciones, SUM(mov.consumos) AS consumos, SUM(mov.cobros) AS cobros, SUM(mov.entregas - mov.devoluciones - mov.consumos - mov.cobros) AS saldo, SUM(mov.registros_cantidad_invalida) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM (SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS entregas, SUM(0) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_entrega GROUP BY codigo, cedula UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(0) AS devoluciones, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_consumo GROUP BY codigo, cedula UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(0) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_cobro GROUP BY codigo, cedula UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_devolucion GROUP BY codigo, cedula) AS mov LEFT JOIN (SELECT p.cedula AS cedula, COALESCE(MAX(p.movil), '') AS movil, COALESCE(MAX(p.nombre), '') AS nombre, COALESCE(MAX(p.apellido), '') AS apellido, COALESCE(MAX(p.estado), '') AS estado_empleado FROM bd_c3nc4s1s.cinco_base_de_personal AS p GROUP BY p.cedula) AS emp ON emp.cedula = mov.cedula LEFT JOIN base_codigos AS cat ON cat.codigo = mov.codigo GROUP BY COALESCE(emp.movil, ''), mov.codigo ORDER BY dimension ASC, saldo DESC, mov.codigo ASC LIMIT 500

reasoning_steps.detail: domain=inventario_logistica intent=inventory_stock_by_mobile capability=inventory_stock_balance_by_mobile
El manager coordina y delega; el runtime deterministico conserva la autoridad de ejecucion.
Delegacion preparada hacia inventory_agent.
domain=inventario_logistica intent=inventory_stock_by_mobile capability=inventory_stock_balance_by_mobile
Se mantiene ai_dictionary como autoridad estructural y QueryExecutionPlanner como autoridad unica de SQL seguro.

Dominio propuesto: inventario_logistica. Intent: inventory_stock_by_mobile. Capability: inventory_serial_stock_by_family_grouped_dimension. Ruta recomendada: sql_assisted. Filtros gobernados: grouping_dimension, material_family. Dominio candidato inicial: inventario_logistica.

insights: La consulta de inventario se resolvio con SQL asistido validado contra ai_dictionary.
metadata.arbitration_reason: Consulta analítica de inventario/logística sobre saldo en móviles para la familia/categoría DECO. No hay solicitud de cambio de conocimiento ni acción de escritura. Requiere apoyo SQL asistido por tratarse de agregado por dimensión con validación en datos.

TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_cobro GROUP BY codigo, cedula UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_devolucion GROUP BY codigo, cedula) AS mov LEFT JOIN (SELECT p.cedula AS cedula, COALESCE(MAX(p.movil), '') AS movil, COALESCE(MAX(p.nombre), '') AS nombre, COALESCE(MAX(p.apellido), '') AS apellido, COALESCE(MAX(p.estado), '') AS estado_empleado FROM bd_c3nc4s1s.cinco_base_de_personal AS p GROUP BY p.cedula) AS emp ON emp.cedula = mov.cedula LEFT JOIN base_codigos AS cat ON cat.codigo = mov.codigo GROUP BY COALESCE(emp.movil, ''), mov.codigo ORDER BY dimension ASC, saldo DESC, mov.codigo ASC LIMIT 500

La evidencia se consolidó en 500 filas agrupadas por móvil y código, con 253 código(s) coincidente(s).
La respuesta se armó desde evidencia agregada por dimensión y no desde detalle operativo sin resumir.
